description: Golden Q&A pairs for RAGAS evaluation. Replace ground_truth fields with verified answers from the actual filings before running evaluate.py.

questions.question: What are the main risk factors disclosed by Apple in its most recent 10-K?
How does Microsoft describe its cloud revenue growth drivers?
Compare the R&D spending of Apple and Microsoft for the most recent fiscal year.
What is Amazon's segment revenue breakdown by AWS, North America, and International?
What does Tesla disclose about its supply chain risks?
Summarise NVIDIA's Management Discussion and Analysis section on data-centre demand.
What credit-risk exposures does JPMorgan Chase highlight?
Has Meta disclosed any material litigation related to user privacy?
What does Alphabet say about ad revenue concentration risk?
Which companies in the dataset call out generative AI as a material risk factor?
What stock repurchase programmes are active across the eight companies?
How does Apple describe its dependence on third-party manufacturers?
What is Microsoft's approach to AI safety as described in its filings?
Compare Tesla's and NVIDIA's gross margin trends.
What climate-related risks does Amazon report?
Which tech companies disclose exposure to China-related regulatory risk?
What is JPMorgan's tier 1 capital ratio?
How does Meta describe its Reality Labs operating losses?
What cybersecurity incident disclosures appear in the dataset?
Summarise Alphabet's other-bets segment performance.
